Off Calendar Feb-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. 1) Cross defendant Barbara Sturla's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Cross-complainant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 10 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid by W.B. Coyle and counsel for cross complainant within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
